/// # Safety
///
/// `ptr` must be valid for reads and properly aligned.
pub fn read_ptr(ptr: *const u8) -> u8 {
    // SAFETY: caller guarantees ptr is valid and aligned.
    unsafe { *ptr }
}

/// # Safety
///
/// `ptr` must be valid for writes and properly aligned.
pub fn write_ptr(ptr: *mut u8, val: u8) {
    // SAFETY: caller guarantees ptr is valid and aligned for writes.
    unsafe { *ptr = val; }
}

/// # Safety
///
/// `slice` must have at least `idx + 1` elements.
pub fn get_unchecked(slice: &[u8], idx: usize) -> u8 {
    // SAFETY: caller guarantees idx is within bounds.
    unsafe { *slice.get_unchecked(idx) }
}

/// # Safety
///
/// `bytes` must contain valid UTF-8.
pub fn from_utf8_unchecked(bytes: &[u8]) -> &str {
    // SAFETY: caller guarantees bytes are valid UTF-8.
    unsafe { std::str::from_utf8_unchecked(bytes) }
}
